How to Write a Perfect Get Well Card

30 real get well messages you can copy-paste today. 5 pro writing tips from our card editors. Bad-vs-good comparisons so you can spot the generic stuff and write something they'll actually remember.

📝 30 copy-paste messages 💡 5 writing tips ✅ Bad vs Good examples ❓ FAQs answered
Jump to: 30 Messages 5 Writing Tips Bad vs Good FAQ Pick a Get Well Template

1 30 Get Well Messages You Can Steal Today

Click 📋 Copy to save to clipboard. Click 🎴 Use on a card to open a get well template with this message ready to go.

01 ✍️ General
🤒 Get well soon! Sending you tons of soup, rest, and healing vibes.🍲💛
🎴 Use on a card
02 ✍️ General
Feel better! Can't wait to have you back to your hilarious self. 😊✨
🎴 Use on a card
03 ✍️ General
Get well soon, we miss your face around here. 🌸💙
🎴 Use on a card
04 ✍️ General
Rest up, drink water, and feel better soon. Sending big hugs. 🫂💗
🎴 Use on a card
05 ✍️ General
Get well soon. Take all the time you need. We'll handle everything else. 💛🙏
🎴 Use on a card
06 ✍️ General
Wishing you a speedy recovery. Get better every day! 🌟💙
🎴 Use on a card
07 👩 For Her
Get well soon, my love. I'll bring soup, blankets, and bad TV. 🍲📺💖
🎴 Use on a card
08 👩 For Her
Feel better, beautiful. Just rest and let me take care of everything else. 💐💗
🎴 Use on a card
09 👩 For Her
Get well soon, gorgeous. Hate seeing you sick. Sending cuddles. 🤗💙
🎴 Use on a card
10 👩 For Her
Drink tea, binge shows, heal up. Miss your smile, baby. 💛🌸
🎴 Use on a card
11 👩 For Her
Get well soon! I'm making your favourite soup. Be there in 20. 🍲💞
🎴 Use on a card
12 👩 For Her
Feel better, gorgeous. I'll bring chocolate AND medicine. Priorities. 🍫😂💗
🎴 Use on a card
13 👨 For Him
Get well soon, bro. Beer is on hold until you're back on your feet. 🍻💪
🎴 Use on a card
14 👨 For Him
Babe, rest up and feel better. I'll handle chores/dinner/kids. 💙🍳
🎴 Use on a card
15 👨 For Him
Get well soon, man. Game night isn't the same without you. 🎮😎
🎴 Use on a card
16 👨 For Him
Feel better, handsome. Gimme that blanket and a movie. 🍕🎬💙
🎴 Use on a card
17 👨 For Him
Get well soon. Stop being a hero and take the day off. 🩹😉💪
🎴 Use on a card
18 👨 For Him
Miss your dumb jokes. Heal up already, buddy. 😂💛
🎴 Use on a card
19 👨👩👧 Family
Get well soon, Mom. Sending you all my love and the biggest hug. 🫂💗
🎴 Use on a card
20 👨👩👧 Family
Feel better, Dad! Take your meds and listen to the doctor. Please. 😘💙
🎴 Use on a card
21 👨👩👧 Family
Get well soon, Grandma/Grandpa! We made you a card. 👧👦❤️
🎴 Use on a card
22 👨👩👧 Family
Rest up, sister/bro — we need you back to fight over the TV remote. 📺😂💛
🎴 Use on a card
23 👨👩👧 Family
Get well soon from all of us! We love you, take it easy. 🤗💙
🎴 Use on a card
24 👨👩👧 Family
Feel better soon. Soup + movies + family = best medicine. 🍲🎬❤️
🎴 Use on a card
25 👯 Friends
Get well soon! I'm bringing snacks and bad reality shows. Be there soon. 🍿📺😂
🎴 Use on a card
26 👯 Friends
Dude, get better. Gym isn't the same without your motivational grunts. 💪🏋️😜💙
🎴 Use on a card
27 👯 Friends
Feel better, bestie! I've got wine waiting for you when you're up. 🍷💗
🎴 Use on a card
28 👯 Friends
Get well soon! Group chat misses your daily memes. 📱🤣💛
🎴 Use on a card
29 👯 Friends
Heal up quick, mate. I need my partner in crime back. 👯✨
🎴 Use on a card
30 👯 Friends
Get well soon! I'd say 'don't do anything I'd do' but you're stuck in bed, so you're safe. 😏💙
🎴 Use on a card

2 5 Pro Tips for Writing Get Well Cards That Get Saved

After editing 10,000+ greeting cards, these are the 5 patterns that separate "nice" cards from "I kept this on my fridge for 3 years" cards.

  1. 💡 Acknowledge how unpleasant they probably feel — don't be overly cheerful.
  2. 💡 Offer practical, zero-effort help: 'I left soup on the porch'.
  3. 💡 Avoid 'everything happens for a reason' unless you're 100% sure it's welcome.
  4. 💡 Mention something specific you miss about them being healthy.
  5. 💡 End with 'Take all the time you need' — no pressure to 'hurry up and get better'.

3 Bad vs Good: Get Well Card Messages, Side by Side

The difference between a forgotten card and a remembered one is usually 2 specific sentences. Here's what that looks like in practice.

❌ Don't write this
Get well soon!
✅ Write this instead
Get well soon, you idiot — you missed the best game of the season and we need you back for trivia night. 😘
❌ Don't write this
Feel better!
✅ Write this instead
Left soup + your favourite chocolate on the porch. Text when you're awake enough to watch trash TV together. 🍲🍫
❌ Don't write this
Hope you feel better quickly!
✅ Write this instead
Take your meds, binge the show, heal slow. Work can wait. YOU come first. 💛

4 Get Well Card Writing — FAQ

The questions we get asked 4–5 times a week about writing get well cards.

Is it okay to be funny in a get-well card?

If the person is a friend and usually laughs with you — YES. Laughter is medicine. For serious illness or work: keep it warm, not jokey.

Is "everything happens for a reason" ever okay?

No. Just no. Even if you believe it — it lands like shit for a sick person. Replace with "this sucks and I'm here".

How often should I check in?

Day 1 = card. Day 3 = short text. Day 7 = actual call if you're close. People feel forgotten after the first wave of "get well soon" texts.

Flowers or card for a hospital patient?

Card ALWAYS. Flowers sometimes get banned for infection risk. Check the hospital rules first. Stuffed animals or books often work too.

All templates are free to design, personalise, and preview. No account needed.
